results.title: Israeli Forces Advance Beyond Litani River, Reach Nabatieh Outskirts
results.description: (MENAFN) Israeli military forces have advanced beyond the Litani River and pressed toward the outskirts of Nabatieh city in southern Lebanon, a senior Lebanese military source told media on Saturday ...

results.title: Concerns mount that Belarus could be a launchpad for a new Russian offensive in Ukraine
results.description: Over four years ago, Belarus' authoritarian President Alexander Lukashenko allowed longtime ally Russia to use his territory to invade Ukraine. Now officials in Kyiv are warning that Lukashenko could again allow his land to serve as a launchpad for more attacks by the Kremlin's forces.

results.title: Concerns mount that Belarus could be a launchpad for a new Russian offensive in Ukraine

results.title: ‘No staring, no judging’: Indian woman praises New Zealand’s work culture for women
results.description: An Indian woman living in New Zealand has praised the country’s work culture and public safety, saying women there are able to take up all kinds of jobs with confidence and dignity, according to Hindustan Times.

results.title: Trump branded 'completely addled' as he claims he 'left Iran's military alone'
results.description: Trump said the U.S. "left Iran's military alone," and within the same interview, he then contradicted himself and said Iran has "no military"

results.title: Abhishek Banerjee attack
results.description: తృణమూల్ కాంగ్రెస్ ఎంపీ, జాతీయ ప్రధాన కార్యదర్శి అభిషేక్ బెనర్జీపై పశ్చిమ బెంగాల్లోని సోనాపూర్లో స్థానికులు దాడి చేసిన సంగతి తెలిసిందే. మేనల్లుడిపై దాడి జరిగిన సంగతి తెలియగానే మమతా బెనర్జీ హుటాహుటిన ఆస్పత్రి దగ్గరకు వెళ్లారు. మేనల్లుడిని పరామర్శించారు.
